title: Nether Trails
description:
"Nether Trails" - A mod for Minecraft whose goal is to improve Nether. The mod adds blocks, items and new mechanics to the game. 
Version for 1.12.2, 1.14.4 and 1.20.1 are not complete.
1.4.1 coming soon
Language:
English 
Russian 
Ukrainian 
French
body:
"Nether Trails" - A mod for Minecraft whose goal is to improve Nether. The mod adds blocks, items and new mechanics to the game. 
The new version of the mod is being developed from scratch. 
Editions (Saving from one edition does not work on another):
Original - normal version of the mod, supports game version 1.20.1. This version is being updated.
Legacy - outdated version of the mod, supports versions 1.19.2 and 1.19.4. This version is not updated.
Classic - unfinished version for versions 1.12.2 and 1.14.4. All textures were adapted to the style of old versions. This version can spoil the idea of the mod with its unfinished.
